full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Understanding the ADMM-based sparse SVM method proposed in the paper
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Explain the core algorithm of the paper 'Efficient Variable Selection in Support Vector Machines via the Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers' step by step.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: The explanation was rewritten in my own words and organized into step-by-step sections as required by the assignment instructions.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Helped clarify the algorithm flow including the L1-regularized SVM objective, auxiliary variable reformulation, ADMM decomposition, and iterative parameter updates.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified by reading the method section of the paper and confirming that the steps match the ADMM optimization procedure described by the authors.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Formatting mathematical equations for Jupyter Notebook markdown

full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Adjusted LaTeX delimiters and inline math formatting to ensure equations render correctly in the notebook.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Helped produce properly formatted equations for the optimization objective and ADMM formulation.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Checked visually in the notebook to confirm that the equations render correctly.
